description: Organized crime cartel in Germany, primarily active in Bremen, Essen, and Berlin. Founded in the 1980s by Mhallami refugees from Syria, Turkey, and Lebanon. Engages in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, protection rackets, and prostitution. Estimated 8,000-10,000 members nationwide. Still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 10 July 2019, GSG 9 police officers arrested and escorted 46-year-old Ibrahim Miri from his apartment in Bremen, flew him to Berlin in a Federal Police helicopter and deported him to Beirut , Lebanon.
country_links.context: The Miri clan has members who fled to Lebanon, and a leader was deported there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The head of the Miri drug trade, Esmat E., had previously fled to Spain because he was being searched for with an international arrest warrant.
country_links.context: A leader of the Miri clan fled to Spain to avoid arrest.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Clan is also in Turkey and Sweden.
country_links.context: The Miri clan is present and active in Sweden.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Clan is also in Turkey and Sweden.
country_links.context: The Miri clan is present and active in Turkey.
